properties.title: Landmark Pinnacle, Marsh Wall, Canary Wharf, London, E14
properties.address: Landmark Pinnacle, Marsh Wall, Canary Wharf, London, E14
properties.description:
We are proud to present this stylish two bedroom, two bathroom apartment in Landmark Pinnacle. Immaculately presented, the property comprises an open plan kitchen living area, two double bedrooms with built in storage, ensuite and main bathroom. Finished to a superb standard throughout, key features include stone worktops in the kitchen and porcelain tiles in the bathroom. 

Landmark Pinnacle is one of the most prestigious developments in Canary Wharf and residents will benefit from 24 hour concierge, private gym, cinema, lounge, roof terrace and golf simulator to name a few of the world class facilities. It is ideally situated being only short walk to Heron Quays DLR station,  Canary Wharf Station for the Jubilee Line and Canary Wharf Pier for the Thames Clipper.With Crossrail arriving soon transport links are only set to get better. The Canary Wharf Estate is only a short walk away boasting an array of shops, bars and restaurants.

comments.text: This looks so good! And good availability! Definitely has a great gym! This tower was completed shortly after covid.

properties.title: Aspen, Marsh Wall, London, E22.
properties.description:
Knight Frank are pleased to offer this 19th floor apartment located within the Aspen development.  The apartment is set over approximately 80.61 sq m (approximately 868 sq ft) and comprises reception room, open plan fully fitted kitchen with breakfast bar, principal bedroom with fitted wardrobes and en suite, second double bedroom with fitted wardrobes, utility room and guest bathroom.  The apartment is offered on a furnished basis.

properties.title: Amory Tower, Marsh Wall, London, E14.
properties.address: Amory Tower, Marsh Wall, London, E14.
properties.description:
Knight Frank are pleased to offer this 22nd floor apartment located within the Amory Tower development.  The apartment is set over approximately 79.12 sq m (approximately 852 sq ft) and offers reception room, winter gardens, semi open plan fully fitted kitchen, 2 double bedrooms, en suite and guest bathroom. 

The development offers concierge, residents lounge and gym/spa facilities..
Additional information
We have been informed that the primary external wall materials of the building/block have been assessed for fire safety. The assessor concluded that the fire risk of the external wall materials is sufficiently low that no remedial works are required. If you have any further questions, you should seek independent professional advice
Amory Tower is located in The Madison on Marsh Wall close to transport links including South Quay DLR station (0.7 miles) All times and distances are approximate.

properties.title: Marsh Wall, E14
properties.description:
An exquisite, brand new two-bedroom apartment situated on the 12th floor of the popular Harcourt Tower building within the exclusive South Quay Plaza development. 

Designed for modern city living, the apartment offers a bright open-plan reception, enhanced by floor-to-ceiling windows that fill the space with natural light and a contemporary kitchen. 

The home features comfort cooling and underfloor heating, providing year-round comfort. The bedroom is generously sized with high-quality finishes, and the modern bathroom is appointed with premium fixtures.

South Quay Plaza offers a 24-hour concierge service, exclusive resident's club lounge with sky bar, terrace and stunning views of the City. Residents also benefit from the use of a state-of-the-art gyn, spa, sauna and steam room as well as a swimming pool. In addition, there is a private screening room as well as co-working spaces.

Please note that the photographs shown are for illustrative purposes only. Exact layouts vary from apartment to apartment. To check broadband and mobile phone coverage please visit Ofcom here ofcom.org.uk/phones-telecoms-and-internet/advice-for-consumers/advice/ofcom-checker

properties.title: Arena Tower, Canary Wharf
properties.description:
Available Now | Fully Furnished | 36th Floor | Parking Available* | Massive Balcony | Breath-Taking Views | 24/7 Concierge | Cinema Room | Gym | Swimming Pool | WeChat: CLH-Consultant.

The Property - Set on the 36th floor of the sought-after Arena Tower, this beautifully presented fully furnished two-bedroom apartment offers contemporary riverside living with spectacular panoramic views across the River Thames towards the iconic The O2 Arena.

The apartment features a bright open-plan reception and dining area, enhanced by engineered oak flooring and floor-to-ceiling sliding doors that flood the space with natural light. The modern kitchen is sleek and highly functional, fitted with integrated appliances including a fridge freezer, microwave, dishwasher, electric hob, and oven, creating a streamlined cooking and dining environment.

including a gym, cardio suite, boxing area, and swimming pool, as well as a private cinema room, games room, and landscaped rooftop garden offering stunning views across the London skyline. Ideally located moments from the vibrant district of Canary Wharf, residents are within easy reach of world-class shopping, dining, and global business headquarters around One Canada Square. properties.title: Arena Tower, Canary Wharf
properties.description:
SHORT LET* | Available Now | Fully Furnished | 36th Floor | Parking Available* | Massive Balcony | Breath-Taking Views | 24/7 Concierge | Cinema Room | Gym | Swimming Pool | WeChat: CLH-Consultant.

The Property - Set on the 36th floor of the sought-after Arena Tower, this beautifully presented fully furnished two-bedroom apartment offers contemporary riverside living with spectacular panoramic views across the River Thames towards the iconic The O2 Arena.

The apartment features a bright open-plan reception and dining area, enhanced by engineered oak flooring and floor-to-ceiling sliding doors that flood the space with natural light. properties.description:
Nestled within the prestigious Amory Tower on Marsh Wall, this sophisticated two-bedroom apartment epitomises contemporary waterside living in the heart of Canary Wharf.

Description

A stunning two bedroom apartment set within the prestigious Amory Tower on Marsh Wall, offering luxury waterside living in the heart of Canary Wharf. Beautifully furnished and flooded with natural light through floorcovering windows, the property features a private balcony with sweeping Thames views, generous open plan living, and two contemporary bathrooms finished to an excellent standard.

properties.description:
Property Reference: 2727227.

Available end of February, our 2 bedroom 2 bathroom apartment in Arena Tower. Formerly known as Baltimore Tower, the luxury apartments were built by Galliard Homes in 2017 and designed by architects Skidmore, Owings & Merrill.

 Spacious open plan living with exceptional outdoor space via a courtyard facing balcony which spans the entire apartment, set on the sixth floor.
Offers ample storage with cupboards in the hallway, housing a washing machine and the air filtering system.  Master bedroom with en-suite shower, second double bedroom and a family bathroom with separate shower and bath. Both bedrooms come with built-in floor to ceiling wardrobes. Also features engineered oak wood flooring, comfort cooling ventilation system, floor to ceiling sliding doors throughout and natural marble tiled bathrooms. 
Bedrooms are currently furnished with a standard double and king size bed with mattresses.

Arena Tower is in walking distance of Canary Wharf shopping plaza and One Canada Square, home to many global businesses, banks, insurance companies, boutiques, high-street retail shops, coffee shops, and restaurants. A short walk south of the development leads to the Isle of Dogs, Island Gardens, and Greenwich via the foot tunnel under the River Thames.

Canary Wharf is home to Jubilee Line, Crossrail, and DLR services, making commuting across London quick and convenient. The Crossharbour DLR Station is the closest rail option, only three stops from Canary Wharf, although many residents consider it within walking distance of Arena Tower.

Facilities available in "The Club" include a gym, cardio suite, a boxing area, and swimming pool. In addition, Arena Tower has a private cinema room, games room, and a landscaped rooftop garden with stunning views of the city skyline. The building is also pet-friendly.
The building has 24-hour concierge services and secure cycle storage.

properties.title: One Thames Quay, Marsh Wall, E14
properties.address: One Thames Quay, Marsh Wall, E14
properties.description:
This elegantly furnished two-bedroom apartment features high-end furniture and fitted wardrobes in both bedrooms. The private balcony offers stunning views over Canary Wharf and the River Thames.

Residents enjoy exclusive access to premium amenities, including a sky gym, sky lounge, sky terrace, communal garden, bowling alley, and 24-hour concierge service.

Ideally located in the heart of Canary Wharf, the property is just a 10-minute walk to Canary Wharf Underground Station, with the Elizabeth Line and Jubilee Line providing fast connections to the city centre.

properties.title: Limeharbour, London
properties.description:
An impressive two-bedroom apartment set within the well-regarded City Tower development, offering refined modern living in the heart of Docklands. Designed with both comfort and style in mind, the property boasts a bright and generously proportioned open-plan living space complemented by a sleek, fully fitted kitchen ideal for entertaining and contemporary city living.

Both bedrooms are well-sized doubles, with the principal suite benefiting from a stylish en-suite bathroom, while a separate modern bathroom serves guests and the second bedroom. properties.title: Harcourt Tower, 67 Marsh Wall, London E14
properties.address: Harcourt Tower, 67 Marsh Wall, London E14
properties.description:
Let UK Home are excited to offer this spectacular 1 bedroom & 1 study room apartment in the heart of Harcourt Tower part of the South Quay Plaza.

This luxurious apartment features a meticulously designed open-plan living, kitchen area, a double bedroom with built-in wardrobe, a study room which can be bedroom, and a spacious family bathroom.

The apartment has a concierge service, a leisure and wellness center and a fitness center (with an outdoor hot tub), iGarden-an advanced shared workspace, supporting conference rooms and outdoor work areas, a game room with an independent soundproof karaoke room, a 20-meter swimming pool, a 56th-floor bar and lounge, and a terrace. It is worth mentioning that the 56th-floor bar is one of the highest residential bars in Europe. Residents can overlook Canary Wharf, the Thames, the City of London, etc., and enjoy a beautiful panoramic view.

Harcourt Tower is located in the heart of Canary Wharf. Canary Wharf has a beautiful environment, with multiple parks and cool blue riverside spaces, a total of 2.6 acres of green place, and complete supporting facilities for life, such as many internationally renowned hotels and more than 280 shops, cafes, bars, and restaurants. It is a shopping paradise, with everything from well-known brand stores, commercial streets to shopping malls. There are also many well-known cultural attractions near Canary Wharf, such as Tower Bridge, Royal Observatory and National Maritime Museum. In addition, there are many art centers, museums and theaters in the area, such as Canary Wharf Arts Centre, Museum of London and Royal Institute of British Architects.

properties.title: One Thames Quay, Canary Wharf, E14
properties.address: One Thames Quay, Canary Wharf, E14
properties.description:
*Available January & offered fully furnished* Gorgeous two bedroom apartment offering uninterrupted views over the Wood Wharf Estate, South Quay Dock & the O2 Arena in the exciting and highly anticipated One Thames Quay, E14

Spanning 775 square feet, this two-bedroom apartment epitomizes modern elegance, with textures and colours meticulously selected for their subtle beauty and streamlined functionality. The living room is a spacious, open canvas of relaxation, inviting you to imprint your unique style, while neutral tones cultivate a sophisticated ambiance. The in-out flow that is offered in these apartments is second to none with the private balcony built into the core of the building, means you are protected from the elements. This apartment specifically offers a North & East exposure.

Residential life at One Thames Quay surpasses the ordinary, providing exclusive access to a collection of private amenities that epitomize refined luxury. Residents have full access to a 24/7 concierge and security service. Located on the second floor you have a 12 pin bowling alley, cinema room and canopy gardens. Then on the 46th floor residents can access the state of the art sky gym & lounge as well as a west & east terrace offering views of Canary Wharf & Greenwich. 

However, what makes One Thames Quay truly remarkable is its aim to be a Green building. The building offers state-of-the-art integrated energy systems emitting zero carbon-dioxide, recycles rainwater collected within the building and each apartment has triple glazed windows.

Strategically situated, One Thames Quay stands as both a major global financial hub and a dynamic residential enclave. Surrounded by bustling cafes, bars, and restaurants, alongside premium shopping options, the locale brims with life. The meticulously curated green spaces, river walks, and parks not only host exhibitions and summer concerts but also street food markets and outdoor dance events, crafting a vibrant living experience right at your doorstep. properties.title: 1 Pan Peninsula, London
properties.description:
A generously sized two-bedroom, two-bathroom apartment in the prestigious West Tower of Pan Peninsula, offering an excellent layout ideal for comfortable living. The property features a large open-plan living and dining area with dual-aspect windows, a fully integrated kitchen, floor-to-ceiling glazing, ample built-in storage, principal en-suite, and a private south-facing balcony.

Residents benefit from 24-hour concierge, swimming pool, gym and private cinema facilities. Perfectly located moments from Canary Wharf and next to South Quay DLR, providing outstanding transport links and access to local amenities.

Furnished / Available Mid-April 
Council Tax Band: G
EPC Rating: C 
Minimum contract: 6 - 12 months
Change of contract fee: 50 including VAT

properties.title: Hampton Tower, Marsh Wall E14
properties.description:
Open plan living space with a kitchen which includes Siemens appliances, Reconstituted stone work surfaces, glass splash-backs and handle-free storage. There is a high specification bathroom suite and a separate bedroom space. The apartment will enjoy underfloor heating & comfort cooling.

Residents will have access to an Residents' Club Lounge on the 56th floor, 24 hour concierge services, Terrace areas, bar facilities, board rooms, a screening room, onsite restaurants as well as London's highest communal garden.

World class leisure facilities include:  luxury gymnasium, a resistance training circuit,160 sq/m swimming pool, as well as a spa, private treatment rooms, sauna & steam room.

South Quay Plaza is perfectly located just a few moments from the heart of London's financial district and set within 2.6 acres of beautiful landscaped gardens. At the heart of the park, new cafes and restaurants will provide places to meet and socialise by the waters edge and Canary Wharf centre is just a short walk away.

Excellent transport links via South Quay DLR and Canary Wharf Jubilee giving quick and easy access into The City and West End as well as London City Airport

We understand that cooling / heating is delivered via a communal system for which separate charges apply.

Rent is payable on a monthly basis and you may be required to pay more than a month's rent in advance, depending on your circumstances. properties.title: 10 Park Drive, Canary Wharf, London, E14
properties.address: 10 Park Drive, Canary Wharf, London, E14
properties.description:
LONG LET. This luxe 2 bed apartment boasts high-spec fittings throughout as well as a balcony overlooking the South Dock. Set in a modern development in Canary Wharf it offers a superbly arranged open plan space on the 6th floor.

10 Park Drive is positioned within a dynamic neighbourhood and offers an array of fantastic transport links around London via Canary Wharf Underground. It offers a wide variety of shops, restaurants and cafes close at hand. 

Please use the reference CHPK4888207 when contacting Foxtons.
keyFeatures: Superb riverside apartment on the 6th floor
Spacious open plan reception with floor to ceiling windows
Private balcony with view of South Dock

properties.title: George Street, London, E14
properties.description:
Welcome home to 10 George Street, placing you at the heart of Wood Wharf. 

Our apartments offer cozy, modern spaces designed for comfort and ease so that you never miss a moment - from early morning coffees to sundowners on the terrace.
With shared lounges, south-facing terrace and plenty of amenity spaces to enjoy alone or with neighbours, 10 George Street is the perfect place to connect, unwind, and truly feel at home.

There's so much more to renting. Enjoy extensive Vertus+ amenity spaces and a programme of curated events hosted in these spaces. With the Vertus+ app our residents also benefit from access to partner perks by neighbourhood brands in Canary Wharf. Fancy a 20% skincare discount, or a drink on us? We have you covered.

AMENITY SPACES
- South facing terrace with BBQ
- Gym and immersive Fiit studio
- Private dining room
- Residents' lounge
- Self-service bar with coffee machine and wine dispenser
- Joint amenity spaces with 8 Water Street

EVENTS
- Wine Wednesday
- Cooking Masterclass
- Resident Book Club

BUILDING
- Free high-speed Wi-Fi throughout the apartments and building - easy to WFH, game, or stream your favourite show without glitches.
- We have a dedicated team on-site (engineers, concierge, building managers) here to help with any questions you have to make your move as stress-free as possible
- Pantree honesty market - so you can pick up essential without leaving your building
- Bring me boxes
- Apartments furnished by Camerich

PERKS
- Monthly exclusives on the residents' app
- Free Fiit membership - the #1 Rated Fitness App with hundreds of killer on-demand workouts with world-class trainers.
- Dry cleaning and laundry services
- Guest suites - fully-furnished suites for residents to book as an extension of their home when hosting more family and friends

NEIGHBOURHOOD
- Feel safe and secure on a private Estate - Canary Wharf.
- Convenient transport connections -Canary Wharf London Underground Station (Jubilee Line) / 3 mins travel*, Heron Quay station (DLR) / 4 mins travel*, South Quay station (DLR) / 8 mins travel*, Canary Wharf Crossrail Place (Elizabeth Line) / 10 minutes travel* (*approximate travel to stations).
- Immerse yourself in convenience and culture with 300 shops, bars and restaurants, 100 cultural events per year, and the UK's largest free-to-visit collection of outdoor public art. The Wharf also benefits from over 16 acres of landscaped parks, boardwalks and squares.

*Please note that all images, floorplans and particulars included are for illustrative and indicative purposes only. Individual features and layout may vary.
*Available for student let

comments.text: Unfurnished

properties.title: Park Drive, London, E14
properties.description:
10 Park Drive is the feature development in Canary Wharf, located in a new residential quarter.

Spanning over 871 square feet of internal space the property comprises two double bedrooms with built-in storage, main bedroom with an en-suite, the other with access to the family bathroom and a large open-plan living area with water views and access to the private balcony. 

The property features mood lighting, floor-to-ceiling windows, wood flooring, a fully integrated kitchen and waterside views. 

The development benefits from a residents lounge located on the 13th floor which includes a cinema room, rooftop terrace, private dining room, coffee machine and wine machine as well as having access to Third Space gym which is just opposite 10 Park Drive.

All known suppliers for mobile phone and broadband services are available in this area. Information regarding broadband options and phone signal can be obtained from the Ofcom broadband and mobile coverage checker. Please contact us for further details.

It is not permitted for a tenant to register a company to the property or operate a business trade or profession from the property.
properties.furnishType: Furnished or unfurnished, landlord is flexible

properties.title: Regatta Point, 1 Manilla Street, E14
properties.description:
Located within walking distance of Canary Wharf is this larger than average two bedroom flat.

The living room provides an ideal relaxation space due to the size and the fact that light can flood into it. In addition the wooden flooring and balcony really add to the appeal. The kitchen is open plan onto the reception room which is ideal for entertaining.

The bedrooms are in keeping with the property as they offer ample room and built in storage.

The family bathroom is in great condition and the master bedroom benefits from en-suite shower room.

Heron Quays and South Quay DLR are a short distance as is Canary Wharf Jubilee line and shopping mall with all the bars and restaurants. The Elizabeth line offering further convenient access to central London.

A modern apartment in this very popular South Quay development walking distance to Canary Wharf and all its amenities. Benefiting from new wooden flooring throughout, spacious reception with open plan fully fitted kitchen & balcony, 2 double bedrooms, 2 bathrooms and good storage. The development further benefits from a porter, gym and pool. EPC rating B

Our China Desk is here for you, if Chinese is your preferred language, please get in touch via WeChat (ChestertonsLettings)

properties.title: Crossharbour Plaza, Canary Wharf
properties.description:
This apartment located in one of Canary Wharf's landmark tower - Arena Tower. Superbly finished with oak veneer wooden flooring, programmable mood lighting, thermostatically controlled central heating, colour video entry phone system, bespoke kitchens and natural marble flooring in the bathrooms. 

The apartment comes fully furnished with a high specification throughout, under floor heating, fully integrated Smeg appliances and built in wardrobes in the bedrooms. The fully furnished apartment, means all you need is a suitcase of your finest clothes and you are set to live in the most prestigious development in Canary Wharf. 

The development offers 24hr concierge service to collect all deliveries and ensure security is constant throughout the year. The gym, pool, boxing and spa area means you will be able to re-energise and stay sharp, with the high tech facilities. The private balcony will allow you to entertain guests or relax with a coffee on a Sunday morning.

Moments away from Crossharbour and South Quay DLR and close to Canary Wharf; means you can easily walk into Canary Wharf or have an easy journey straight into the city; you will be the envy of your colleagues and friends as you effortlessly travel to work. You are right in the hustle and bustle of Canary Wharf, with easy access to the shopping centres, restaurants, bars and all the other amenities Canary Wharf has to offer. Living in Canary Wharf provides you with the single place in London where you have the roar of the city Monday-Friday and tranquillity on the weekends.

Set on a high floor, the spacious dual-aspect (south-east / north-east) living room features floor-to-ceiling windows and enjoys exceptional views across the London skyline. The principal bedroom benefits from built-in wardrobes and a luxurious en-suite bathroom with both a separate shower and bathtub. A well-proportioned second double bedroom is served by a stylish additional bathroom.

The contemporary kitchen is finished with stone countertops and a full suite of high-specification integrated appliances, including an electric oven, induction hob, full-height fridge/freezer, washer/dryer, dishwasher and wine cooler. A breakfast bar neatly connects the kitchen to the living area, creating an ideal space for both everyday living and entertaining.

The apartment is pre-wired for satellite TV and fibre broadband. Residents also benefit from intuitive touchscreen controls for heating, comfort cooling and lighting (with dimming functionality), as well as a video entry system. The building is served by Hyperoptic, offering internet speeds of up to 1Gb.

Ideally positioned, the property is just a five-minute walk into the heart of the Canary Wharf estate and the Jubilee line station, and approximately ten minutes on foot to the Elizabeth line station.

Available fully furnished or part furnished.

properties.title: Indescon Square, London
properties.description:
When you get a spare moment you'll want to come and see this 2 bedroom, 2 bathroom apartment. The apartment of the Indescon Square development where you can sit back and relax on your own private balcony after a long day at the office. 

Enjoy your own paradise of comfort and modernity in the open plan kitchen and living room, where cooking and watching your favourite TV series goes hand in hand. No more London box bedrooms for you, as the spacious bedroom allows you to wake up in style with floor to ceiling windows. 

Sometimes living in the city can be pretty noisy, but living here offers a moment of rare tranquillity amongst the popular business districts, with no busy roads outside your door. The local area provides you with close by shops as well as all the amenities Canary Wharf has to offer. The 24hr concierge are always on hand to help you collect parcels or even just to make you feel safe whilst walking around the development.

Situated only 0.5 miles from Canary Wharf Tube station and 0.4 miles from South Quay DLR, commuting to work, whether you work in Canary Wharf itself or the City, is easy.

properties.title: Turner House, Canary Wharf, London
properties.description:
Set within the ever-popular Canary Central development, this generously sized 2-bedroom apartment is in a greatly sought-after area. 

The living room has sufficient space for entertaining guests, hosting dinner parties or even having a quiet night in with a friend. The kitchen has an open plan style which leads into the living room, spread over three walls to give you sufficient kitchen space to embrace your inner Gordon Ramsey. Coming fully equipped with a built in microwave, oven a built-in fridge-freezer, whether you are a food connoisseur or a regular at the local takeaway, the kitchen has everything you need.  There's no need to faff about with washing up either, as this apartment comes with a handy built-in dishwasher which makes tidying a 5-minute job. 

The two double-bed, fully furnished bedrooms are great if you are sharing with a friend/ colleague or even if you need an extra room for storage. The apartment also consists of two bathrooms, with the master bedroom having an en-suite, so no need for morning arguments about who gets to use the shower first!

Living in this development, you can keep fit in the newly refurbished gym and swimming pool or relax in the spa area. As well as having a concierge available to hold onto any parcels that might be delivered whilst you are out. Situated only 0.5 miles from Canary Wharf Tube station and 0.4 miles from South Quay DLR, commuting to work, whether you work in Canary Wharf itself or the City, is easy. Then arrange a viewing before someone else snaps it up.

properties.title: East Tower, 3 Pan Peninsula Square, Canary Wharf, London, E14
properties.address: East Tower, 3 Pan Peninsula Square, Canary Wharf, London, E14
properties.description:
A beautifully appointed, two bedroom, two bathroom apartment set within this striking and sophisticated residential tower. 

This dual-aspect home enjoys impressive south- and west-facing views, enhanced by floor-to-ceiling windows that flood the space with natural light. The apartment features elegant wooden flooring, a sleek modern kitchen, two stylish bathrooms, and a private balcony

On-site facilities include 24-hour concierge service, extensive leisure facilities, exclusive use of a designer cinema. The development is located a short distance from South Quay DLR station providing residents with a useful transport link for commutes to Canary Wharf which now includes the new Elizabeth Line and other destinations within the Capital.

properties.title: Aspen, 50 Marsh Wall, London E22
properties.description:
Let UK Home are excited to offer this spectacular 2 bedroom apartment in the heart of Aspen part of the Canary Wharf.

This property comprises a large bright open plan kitchen and living room with great views, two double bedrooms with fitted wardrobes (master en-suite), a large family sized bathroom and ample storage.

Residents of this exceptional development will have exclusive use of indoor swimming pool, sauna, steam room, gymnasium, game room, screening room, private dining and wine tasting room. Furthermore, residents will also benefit from a 24 hour concierge and an unrivalled selection of shops, bars, restaurants, leisure facilities and beautiful courtyards. 

There are four shopping malls near Aspen: Jubilee Place Shopping Mall and Canary Wharf Shopping Center, etc., with a total of more than 300 stores, ranging from luxury brands to affordable brands, all available here. There are also many restaurants, cafes and bars with different cuisines from all over the world.
keyFeatures: Private Dining and Wine Tasting Room

properties.title: Marsh Wall, London, E14
properties.description:
This well-positioned large two bedroom apartment on the 23rd floor, with stunning views facing South Dock and Canary Wharf within the high-end development South Quay Plaza, is available immediately for rent through Prime London. The 633 sq ft (58.85 sq m) apartment features large floor-to-ceiling windows, offering stunning views of Canary Wharf, and includes underfloor heating and comfort cooling.

Residents become exclusive members of The Quay Club, providing 5-star facilities such as a state-of-the-art gym, a 20m swimming pool overlooking South Dock, a business lounge, a screening room, and a private dining room. The 56th-floor bar and terrace offer incredible views of the city skyline. Additionally, the development boasts a 24-hour concierge, on-site security with CCTV, a Bamboo Sanctuary health suite with external hot tubs, and the iGarden - a modern co-working business space with a meeting room and external workspace. There is also a games room with a separate insulated karaoke room and the Sky Meadow, a stunning roof garden.

Located moments from London's financial district, the development stands within 2.6 acres of beautifully landscaped gardens with over 150 new trees, creating an urban oasis. properties.description:
**Video Viewing Available**

Modern Furnished 2-Bed Apartment in South Quay Plaza, Canary Wharf

Fantastic location * Superb transport links * Excellent for professionals & students

Welcome to this stylish fully furnished 2-bedroom, 1-bathroom apartment in the iconic South Quay Plaza, one of Canary Wharf's most desirable residential developments. This contemporary home offers vibrant urban living with panoramic views, high-end finishes, and fantastic on-site amenities.

Prime Canary Wharf Address

Located in the heart of East London's financial district, this property benefits from outstanding transport connections and is perfect for commuting to universities, office hubs, and central London attractions.   

  Exceptional Transport & Commute Times
 * South Quay DLR Station - ~1 min walk
 * Canary Wharf Underground & Elizabeth Line - ~5-8 min walk
 * Bank (City of London) - ~10 min by DLR/Tube
 * Liverpool Street (Tech & Finance Hub) - ~7-10 min by public transport
 * Westminster (Central London) - ~11-15 min by Tube

  Commuting to Major Workplaces
 * Canary Wharf offices - ~5-10 min on foot or via DLR/Tube
 * City of London (Bank/Liverpool St) - ~10-15 min commute   

  Commuting to Universities
 * Queen Mary University of London - ~25 min by DLR/Tube
 * King's College London (Waterloo) - ~30 min by public transport
 * London School of Economics (LSE) - ~35 min by Tube
 * University College London (UCL) - ~40 min by Tube

properties.title: 75 Marsh Wall, London, E14 9QA
properties.description:
A stunning two-bedroom, two-bathroom apartment in Hampton Tower, a spectacular 68-storey dockside development in the heart of Canary Wharf, E14.

The apartment features a bright and spacious open-plan living area with dual-aspect views of the Thames and the O2, a modern kitchen with fully integrated appliances, a master bedroom with built-in wardrobe and en-suite bathroom, a second double bedroom, and a stylish family bathroom.

Luxury finishes and high-spec features include floor-to-ceiling windows, underfloor heating, comfort cooling, lightwood engineered flooring, porcelain-tiled bathrooms, high-quality kitchen appliances, fibre-optic infrastructure, and home automation for heating and lighting control.

Residents of South Quay Plaza enjoy world-class facilities, including a 24-hour concierge, 20-metre swimming pool with double-height ceilings, thermal suite with hot pool, sauna, and steam room, fully equipped gym, spa treatment rooms, and a residents" club lounge on level 56 with bar, boardrooms, screening room, and London"s highest communal roof garden with breathtaking views.

Ideally located, the property is just moments from South Quay DLR and a short walk to Canary Wharf Underground Station, offering excellent transport links alongside a wealth of supermarkets, restaurants, cafes, and leisure facilities.
keyFeatures: Dual-aspect views of Thames and O2

properties.title: 1 Wards Place, London, Greater London, E14 9DU
properties.address: 1 Wards Place, London, Greater London, E14 9DU
properties.description:
A beautifully presented two-bedroom apartment in the prestigious Wardian development, perfectly situated in the heart of the Isle of Dogs.

The apartment features a spacious open-plan living and dining area opening onto a large wraparound balcony, a modern fitted kitchen with integrated appliances, two generous bedrooms including a master with en-suite, and a sleek family bathroom. Additional highlights include built-in storage, wood flooring, floor-to-ceiling windows, and recessed lighting, creating a bright and contemporary living space.

Residents have access to a host of luxury on-site amenities, including a sky lounge, swimming pool, state-of-the-art gym, private cinema, and 24-hour concierge, providing a premium lifestyle.

The development is ideally located with excellent transport links and local amenities. Heron Quays Station is just 0.2 miles away, and Canary Wharf Underground Station is 0.3 miles, offering quick and convenient access across London.

properties.title: Manilla Street, London
properties.description:
A beautifully presented two-bedroom apartment located on sought-after Manilla Street, in the heart of Canary Wharf.

This spacious and contemporary property offers two generous double bedrooms, a separate study ideal for home working, and a bright open-plan living and dining area designed for modern living.

Ideally positioned moments from the shops, restaurants, and transport links of Canary Wharf, including the Jubilee Line and Elizabeth Line, the property offers superb connectivity across London

properties.title: Aspen Wharf, Canary Wharf, E14
properties.description:
Available immediately is this luxury two-bed apartment in the highly anticipated Aspen development in Canary Wharf.

Boasting over 800 sq. ft. of living space, this luxurious two-bed apartment is offered fully furnished and is available for immediate occupation. The property is comprised of two spacious double-bedrooms, both with fitted wardrobes, a spacious open-plan living and kitchen area benefitting from large floor-to-ceiling windows and a corner aspect. The kitchen is beautifully finished and includes all the fitted appliances you'd expect, with an additional breakfast bar attached.. The master bedroom benefits from a en-suite with a stunning walk-in shower, and the family bathroom is accessible from the entrance hallway.

The 67-story development will boast state of the art amenities including a resident's gym & pool, 24-hour concierge, communal sky lounge, wellness suite, indoor & outdoor play areas, games room, dining room and a resident's cinema.

properties.title: Bagshaw Building, Wardian, 1 Wards Place, Canary Wharf, London, E14
properties.address: Bagshaw Building, Wardian, 1 Wards Place, Canary Wharf, London, E14
properties.description:
Beautifully presented, two bedroom apartment set within this ground-breaking development located in the heart of the Isle Of Dogs. 

This property boasts a large wraparound balcony, bright open plan living/dining area, fitted kitchen with integrated appliances, two ample sized bedrooms, master en suite, modern bathroom suite, fitted storage, wood flooring, large floor-to-ceiling glazing and recessed lighting.

Residents benefit from access to exclusive first class facilities including Residents' sky lounge, swimming pool, state-of-the-art gymnasium, private residents' cinema and 24-hour concierge.

Wardian enjoys an abundance of nearby local amenities and transport connections. The development is only 0.2 miles from Heron Quays Station and 0.3 miles from Canary Wharf underground Station.

properties.description:
Located on the seventh floor of this popular development, this spacious corner unit comes with floor to ceiling windows, open plan fully fitted kitchen with granite work tops, modern bathrooms, balcony and is bright and airy. Canary Central is ideally located in the heart of South Quay minutes from South Quay station and boasts 24 hour concierge, gym, swimming pool and sauna.

Our China Desk is here for you, if Chinese is your preferred language, please get in touch via WeChat (ChestertonsLettings)

properties.title: Marsh Wall, London, E14
properties.description:
This stunning 2-bedroom apartment features spacious layouts and modern finishes, highlighted by floor-to-ceiling windows that fill the space with natural light.  

The open-plan living area flows seamlessly into a bespoke fitted kitchen, complete with integrated Siemens appliances, perfect for culinary enthusiasts. Enjoy the comfort of underfloor heating throughout the apartment. 

The stylish bathroom boasts a tiled-mosaic feature wall, an integrated vanity unit, and bespoke lighting, adding elegance to your daily routine. Many apartments also include a private balcony or winter garden, ideal for relaxation or entertaining. 

Residents enjoy exceptional amenities, including a fully-equipped gym, swimming pool, sauna, and steam room. With a 24/7 concierge service, your needs are always met. 

Amory Tower offers a modern lifestyle in the heart of London. Don't miss the chance to make this beautiful apartment your home. For viewings or more information, please reach out!

David Mews A two bedroom balconied apartment in City Tower which is situated within walking distance of Canary Wharf and positioned opposite Crossharbour DLR. This apartment comprises an open-plan reception with fitted kitchen, generous sized bedrooms, a contemporary bathroom and ensuite. Further benefits include balcony and wooden flooring.

City Tower benefits from 24hr concierge and is located within a short distance of the Jubilee Line for easy access to Bank and The City of London.

properties.title: Aspen, Canary Wharf
properties.description: A truly exceptional 16th floor brand-new high specification two double bedroom two bathroom apartment available to view now. The apartment is located in the highly coveted Aspen Residence development which is just moments from South Quay and Canary Wharf. The property benefits from a stunning open plan reception room with floor to ceiling windows, a fully equipped kitchen, two double bedrooms both with in-built wardrobes and floor to ceiling windows, two modern and contemporary bathrooms and a separate utility cupboard. Further benefits include 24 hours concierge and is available Furnished.
keyFeatures: Floor to ceiling windows in every room

properties.title: Westferry Road, E14
properties.description:
Set within the prestigious Millennium Harbour development on the vibrant Isle of Dogs, this beautifully presented two-bedroom, two-bathroom apartment offers contemporary riverside living just moments from the heart of Canary Wharf.

Situated on the second floor, the apartment spans approximately 750 sq. ft. and features a bright, spacious layout designed for both comfort and style. The West-facing reception room enjoys excellent natural light and opens onto a charming Juliet balcony, providing far-reaching views towards the river and London skyline. 

The modern kitchen comes fully fitted with integrated appliances, offering a sleek and practical space for cooking and entertaining. 

The primary bedroom benefits from an en-suite bathroom, while a second well-proportioned double bedroom is served by a family bathroom off the hallway. Ample built-in storage enhances the overall convenience of the home.

Millennium Harbour is a secure gated-development, offering 24-hour concierge service and gym. The use of one parking space can be available by separate negotiation and the property has fibre optic broadband. To check broadband and mobile phone coverage please visit Ofcom here ofcom.org.uk/phones-telecoms-and-internet/advice-for-consumers/advice/ofcom-checker

properties.title: Harcourt Tower, Marsh Wall, London, E14
properties.address: Harcourt Tower, Marsh Wall, London, E14
properties.description:
Luxurious two bedroom apartment located in Harcourt Tower, the latest phase of South Quay Plaza development in Canary Wharf. Located on a low floor with approximately 625sq ft internal area, this apartment offers a west facing open plan living/dining area, two bedroom and a contemporary bathroom. Residents of South Quay Plaza benefit from 24hr concierge, gym, pool and sky lounge.


Ideally located in the heart of Canary Wharf, which has now overtaken the City of London as Europe's pre-eminent financial hub, South Quay Plaza enjoys unparalleled transport connections. Perfectly set just a short walk away from both Canary Wharf Underground and South Quay DLR stations, the transport links are fantastic. These include the Jubilee Line, Docklands Light Railway and Thames Clipper boat services. Canary Wharf is now also a key station for the major new east-west railway line, Crossrail.

Residents of South Quay Plaza benefit from best in class facilities including co-working space; state of the art gym; health spa with external hot tubs; games room; kareoke room; swimming pool and 24hr concierge service.

*Council tax band is an estimate
keyFeatures: Close to the DLR and Jubilee Line

properties.title: Millharbour, London, E14
properties.description:
John D Wood is proud to present this two bedroom apartment, which is nestled in the popular secure Millharbour development, located in the enviable Canary Wharf, E14.

This property comprises a master double bedroom with en-suite shower room, an additional bathroom with a three piece suite and a further bedroom. The open-plan kitchen has integrated appliances and stylish worktops; wooden cabinets combined with stainless steel finishes give a modern touch to this area. There is a bright reception room with a dining area and a floor to ceiling door leading to a lovely balcony.

Millharbour is a well-known and secure development that offers 24-hour concierge service, stunning communal water gardens and on-site supermarket. This flat is perfectly placed for regular use of the many appealing shops, bars and restaurants that can be found in Canary Wharf and Docklands. Westfield Stratford is around 10 minutes away, via the London Underground, providing an abundance of shops and restaurants for every taste links include South Quay DLR station and Canary Wharf Underground station providing great daily commute to the City and West End.

City Tower is conveniently located within 750 metres of Canary Wharf, & within 150 metres of Crossharbour DLR Station for easy access to Canary Wharf & The City. properties.title: Landmark Pinnacle, Marsh Wall E14
properties.description:
Nestled within the iconic Landmark Pinnacle, one of London's tallest residential towers, this sophisticated two-bedroom apartment offers an unparalleled living experience in the heart of Canary Wharf. The development's striking architectural presence and premium positioning create an address of distinction for discerning tenants.

This beautifully furnished apartment showcases premium finishes and fixtures throughout, creating an atmosphere of contemporary elegance. The spectacular far-reaching views encompass the meandering River Thames, the dynamic City of London skyline, and the distinctive silhouette of The Shard, providing a constantly evolving urban panorama that transforms from sunrise to sunset. The thoughtful interior layout maximises both the generous proportions and the dramatic vistas, while abundant natural light floods the living spaces.

The exceptional amenities elevate everyday living to resort-style luxury. The development features a fully equipped gymnasium for maintaining wellness routines, a sophisticated cinema room for private screenings, and two elegantly appointed lounge areas perfect for entertaining or quiet relaxation. Two private dining areas offer intimate settings for hosting guests, while the 24-hour concierge service ensures seamless daily living with professional support always available.

The location provides immediate access to Canary Wharf's world-class business district, with Heron Quays DLR station and Canary Wharf Jubilee line station both within easy walking distance. This prime positioning connects tenants effortlessly to the City, West End, and beyond, while the surrounding area offers an abundance of high-end restaurants, boutique shopping, and waterside walks along the Thames Path.

The neighbourhood combines the energy of a major financial hub with the tranquillity of riverside living, where modern towers rise alongside historic docks and contemporary developments. The area's continued evolution ensures a dynamic environment that caters to professionals seeking both convenience and lifestyle quality, making this an ideal base for flexible rental arrangements.

We understand that cooling / heating is delivered via a communal system for which separate charges apply.

properties.title: Amory Tower, Marsh Wall, E14
properties.description:
Nestled within the prestigious Amory Tower on Marsh Wall, this sophisticated two-bedroom apartment epitomises contemporary waterside living in the heart of Canary Wharf. The development's striking architectural presence commands attention along the Thames, offering residents an exclusive lifestyle within one of London's most dynamic business districts.

This beautifully furnished apartment showcases modern design throughout, enhanced by the natural light that floods through floor-to-ceiling windows. The private winter garden serves as a tranquil retreat, presenting sweeping views across the Thames that capture the ever-changing rhythm of London's river life. The thoughtful layout maximises the generous proportions, with two well-appointed bathrooms providing convenience and luxury for modern living.

Residents enjoy access to an impressive array of premium amenities that define luxury apartment living. The 24-hour concierge service ensures seamless daily life, while the comprehensive gym and spa facilities provide wellness and relaxation without leaving the building. The private cinema offers entertainment in sophisticated surroundings, and the residents' bar creates the perfect setting for socialising and unwinding with fellow residents.

Canary Wharf's transformation into a thriving residential and business hub continues to evolve, with Marsh Wall representing some of the area's most sought-after addresses. The neighbourhood seamlessly blends corporate energy with waterside tranquility, offering an abundance of restaurants, bars, and retail destinations. The nearby Crossharbour DLR station provides swift connections across London, while Canary Wharf's extensive transport network ensures excellent accessibility to the City and beyond.

The surrounding area benefits from beautifully landscaped public spaces and waterfront walkways that celebrate the Thames setting. Local amenities include premium shopping at Canary Wharf's retail centres, diverse dining options from casual to fine dining, and cultural attractions that make this one of London's most complete residential destinations.

This exceptional apartment offers the flexibility and convenience that modern tenants seek, combining luxury amenities with an unbeatable location for those who appreciate the finest in contemporary London living.

properties.title: Amory Tower, Marsh Wall E14
properties.description:
This sophisticated furnished two-bedroom apartment occupies a prime position within the prestigious Amory Tower on Marsh Wall, offering contemporary living in the heart of Canary Wharf's dynamic financial district. The development exemplifies modern urban luxury, with sleek architectural lines and premium finishes throughout creating an atmosphere of refined elegance.

The apartment benefits from an exceptional suite of resident amenities that elevate everyday living to resort-style luxury. The private gym and spa facilities provide a sanctuary for wellness and relaxation, while the exclusive residents' cinema offers entertainment at your doorstep. The rooftop terrace creates an elevated outdoor retreat, perfect for unwinding after a busy day, while the residents' bar provides an sophisticated social hub within the building.

The property features two well-appointed bathroom suites, ensuring comfort and convenience for modern living. Being fully furnished, the apartment offers immediate move-in flexibility, making it ideal for professionals seeking a seamless transition to Canary Wharf living. The 24-hour concierge service provides security and assistance around the clock, adding an extra layer of luxury and peace of mind.

Canary Wharf represents London's most vibrant business district, where cutting-edge architecture meets riverside tranquillity. The area pulses with energy during business hours yet transforms into a serene waterside community in the evenings. The nearby Thames Path offers scenic walks along the river, while the district's impressive array of restaurants, bars, and shopping destinations cater to every lifestyle need.

Transport connections are exceptional, with Canary Wharf Underground and DLR stations providing swift access across London. South Quay DLR station offers additional connectivity, ensuring seamless travel to the City, West End, and beyond. The area's transport infrastructure makes commuting effortless while maintaining the exclusivity of waterside living.

This furnished apartment presents an ideal opportunity for those seeking premium rental accommodation with unmatched amenities and location convenience, offering the flexibility and comfort that define modern Canary Wharf living.

We understand that cooling / heating is delivered via a communal system for which separate charges apply.

properties.title: Quadrant Walk, Canary Wharf
properties.description:
We bet you haven't seen a flat this size! Come see this amazing two bedroom / two bathroom located in the highly sought after Lanterns Court Development. The spacious open plan kitchen and living area is perfect for making sure that you never miss a TV show just to make a cup of tea.  Completely furnished throughout with stylish and modern furniture, you will feel as if you are living in a high class showroom. Why settle for second best when you can live in an apartment that will make you the envy of all your guests! The fully integrated kitchen appliances and dishwasher make rustling up a 3 course meal a breeze and cleaning up even easier.

Sometimes living in the city can be pretty noisy, but living here offers a moment of rare tranquillity amongst the popular business districts, with no busy roads outside your door. The local area provides you with close by shops as well as all the amenities Canary Wharf has to offer. The 24hr concierge are always on hand to help you collect parcels and the residents only gym is perfect to re-energize after a long day at work. Situated only 0.5 miles from Canary Wharf Tube station and 0.4 miles from South Quay DLR, commuting to work, whether you work in Canary Wharf itself or the City, is easy.

properties.title: Heritage Tower, London, E14
properties.description:
Property Reference: 2767984.

This 9th floor luxury two-bed, two-bath apartment has everything you need from a fully equipped kitchen to thoughtful styling throughout. The apartment benefits from a large outdoor terrace overlooking the O2 Arena, residents' gym and 24-hour concierge. 

The master bedroom is equipped with a comfortable King size bed, desk/workspace area and built-in wardrobes. The en-suite bathroom benefits from a walk-in rainfall shower and heated towel rack.

The second bedroom includes a Double bed, wardrobe and chest of drawers. Both bedrooms benefit from luxurious blackout curtains. Across the hallway, there is a guest bathroom with bathtub and rainfall shower. 

The open-plan living, dining and kitchen area is stylishly designed, with a plush sofa, armchair and artwork throughout. There is a 40" TV included in the rental. The kitchen is equipped with a built-in Siemens oven, induction stove and microwave. Additionally, there is a dishwasher, combination washer-dryer and kettle. 

Residents benefit from a secure building with concierge, CCTV and gym in the building

properties.title: Discovery Dock East Tower, 2 South Quay Square, South Quay, Canary Wharf, London, E14 9RU
properties.address: Discovery Dock East Tower, 2 South Quay Square, South Quay, Canary Wharf, London, E14 9RU
properties.description: David Mews are delighted to present this exceptional two-bedroom apartment in the prestigious Discovery Dock development, offering an unparalleled blend of luxury and convenience on South Quay. Meticulously designed, this residence features two spacious double bedrooms, including a master suite with a sleek en-suite bathroom, alongside a second modern bathroom for added comfort. The open-plan kitchen and lounge is a masterpiece of contemporary living, complete with granite worktops, underfloor heating, and high-end branded appliances, creating a stylish and functional space for both relaxation and entertaining. Step onto the private balcony to enjoy serene dock views, enhancing the apartment"s tranquil yet vibrant atmosphere. Residents benefit from exclusive access to a state-of-the-art gym, a stunning swimming pool and a 24-hour concierge, ensuring a lifestyle of ease and sophistication. With the added convenience of private parking and seamless access to Canary Wharf via the adjacent footbridge, this fully furnished apartment is a rare opportunity to experience premium riverside living in one of London"s most sought-after locations.

properties.title:
Hobart Building, 
2 Wards Place, E14
properties.description:
An exquisite 875sq/ft two bedroom apartment on the 44th floor of the Hobart Building, an award winning Ballymore development.

Comprising a bright and airy interior with carefully designed open plan living area leading to an exceptional wrap around terrace offering breath-taking views, fully integrated kitchen, main bedroom with luxury en-suite bathroom, second double bedroom and a very well appointed second bathroom.

Residents have an exclusive membership to The Wardian Club allowing access to a state of art gym facilities, 25m swimming pool, cinema and 24-hour concierge service.

Canary Wharf is home to a wealth of restaurants and boutique shops offering luxury fashion, jewellery and more.

The Wardian benefits from excellent transport connections including the Jubilee Line, Docklands Light Railway, Thames Clipper boat services and European flights via London City Airport. Holding deposit: 1 weeks rent.

Our China Desk is here for you, if Chinese is your preferred language, please get in touch via WeChat (ChestertonsLettings)

properties.title: Ability Place, Canary Wharf, London, E14
properties.address: Ability Place, Canary Wharf, London, E14
properties.description:
LONG LET. A 2 bedroom, 19th floor apartment located in a modern development with on-site concierge, a large private roof terrace, located close to Canary Wharf amenities.

Ideally situated within easy reach of the many amenities of Canary Wharf and Docklands with the green open spaces of Mudchute Park also within easy reach. 

Please use the reference CHPK3470997 when contacting Foxtons.

properties.title: Ability Place, 37 Milharbour, London, E14
properties.description:
Located on the nineteenth floor of Ability Place, this beautifully presented two-bedroom, two-bathroom apartment offers bright, modern living with impressive elevated views.

The property features a spacious open-plan reception and dining area with floor-to-ceiling windows, allowing for excellent natural light throughout. A private balcony provides the perfect outdoor space to relax and enjoy panoramic views across the skyline.

Residents of Ability Place enjoy 24-hour concierge service, lift access, and access to premium on-site amenities (where applicable). The development is superbly located providing excellent transport links and easy access to shops, restaurants, and the financial dis

properties.title: Arena Tower, Canary Wharf, London, E14
properties.address: Arena Tower, Canary Wharf, London, E14
properties.description:
Two double bedroom apartment in the heart of Canary Wharf E14, this spacious apartment comprises of a large reception room with open-plan kitchen area, two double bedrooms, luxury bathroom and large private balcony accessible from the reception. Floor-to-ceiling windows offer an abundance of natural light and give this property the 'wow-factor.'

Residents will be able to enjoy the use of the largest residential gym and leisure facility in London, with a 25 metre pool, fully-equipped cardio suite, sauna and spa pool. Also within the Arena Tower is a split-level brasserie, bar, restaurant, and exclusive private residents lounge with a large screen cinema room.
Arena Tower is ideally situated for transport links into the city and beyond, with easy access to the DLR at Crossharbour (0.1 miles), South quay (0.3 miles) and the Jubilee Line at Canary Wharf Underground Station (0.9 miles).

This property is located just a short walk away from Canary Wharfs many amenities, with a cinema, entertainment, art and event spaces and over 120 stores, including Aspinal of London, Jo Malone, Zara and Waitrose. The area also boasts Michelin starred restaurants and a great selection of bars, many of which boast far-reaching city views.

properties.title: Millharbour, Canary Wharf, London, E14
properties.description:
A bright two bed penthouse apartment with a large roof terrace with panoramic views across London.


Description

A bright two bedroom penthouse apartment situated on the 19th floor of this modern development, in a highly sought after location near South Quay DLR station.

The apartment includes two bathrooms, separate reception room and kitchen, and a large roof terrace with panoramic views across London.

Further benefits include 24 hour concierge, allocated parking and an onsite gym.

Car free development - please enquire as to designated parking, but resident permits are not available.

This property has/may have cladding, as far as we know the current position with the property is:

We are making enquiries about the external wall system to see if the property has any cladding

Location

Ability Place is ideally located only a few moments from the centre of Canary Wharf, allowing residents to enjoy all Canary Wharf has to offer. As well as providing access to the Jubilee Line and South Quay (DLR).

A 29th floor, two bedroom, two bathroom apartment situated within the popular development of Amory Tower, E14. The property benefits from unobstructed river and city views, a private balcony and furnished to a high-quality level.

Our China Desk is here for you, if Chinese is your preferred language, please get in touch via WeChat (ChestertonsLettings)

properties.description:
Property Reference: 2782871.

Luxury two-bedroom, top-floor apartment set within an exclusive development offering gym and spa facilities. The property features a spacious open-plan living and kitchen area, flooded with natural light, and opens onto a huge private terrace, ideal for entertaining or relaxing. 
 Perfectly located within a 10-minute walk of Canary Wharf, with its world-class dining, shopping, and transport links, and less than a 5-minute walk to South Quay DLR, providing excellent connectivity across London.

properties.title: Harbour Way, Canary Wharf
properties.description:
Stunning two-bedroom apartment within the highly popular Maine Tower development in E14.

The apartment featres a walnut hardwood flooring, recessed LED down lighting and comfort cooling throughout. Kitchens will be equipped with a stone worktop with smoke grey splashbacks as well as fully integrated stainless steel Smeg electric appliances. You'll enjoy bespoke entertainment units in the living room, providing convenient low-level cupboard space and bookcase storage above. Bedrooms are carpeted and include large floor-to-ceiling fitted wardrobes.

Working from home? Good news! You will also have access to a residents-only business centre, boardroom and library. When it's time to relax, you can sit back in the residents-only cinema room. The 24-hour concierge service and porterage are also on hand to ensure your comfort.

properties.title: Luxury Apartment 2 Bed Canary Wharf
properties.description: Nestled in central London, this fully furnished and impeccably modern apartment offers convenience and style. properties.title: Landmark East Tower, E14
properties.description:
A stunning two bedroom apartment situated on the 31st floor of this popular development offering communal gym and 24 hour concierge. 

The property boasts modern open plan kitchen to reception room with spectacular views of the River Thames and the City.

The principal bedroom offers built-in wardrobes and an en suite shower room. The second double bedroom is of a good size and also boasts built-in wardrobes and there is a separate family bathroom with shower over bath. 

Landmark East Tower is located in the heart of South Quay and is well located for both Heron Quays and South Quay DLR and Canary Wharf Jubilee Line Station, as well as the bars, restaurants and shops that Canary Wharf has to offer. To check broadband and mobile phone coverage please visit Ofcom here ofcom.org.uk/phones-telecoms-and-internet/advice-for-consumers/advice/ofcom-checker

properties.title: Markham Heights, Canary Wharf, London
properties.description:
This beautifully presented two-bedroom, two-bathroom apartment offers stylish, fully furnished living in the heart of E14. Situated on a high floor, the property boasts a private balcony with impressive views, providing the perfect space to relax or entertain.

Extending to approximately 837 sq. Ft internally, the apartment features a spacious open-plan living and dining area, a modern fully fitted kitchen, two generous double bedrooms, and two contemporary bathrooms.

Residents benefit from a 24-hour concierge service and exclusive access to the renowned Nuffield Health health club, adding convenience and luxury to everyday living.

Positioned moments from Crossharbour DLR station, providing swift and convenient connections to Canary Wharf and the City. properties.title: Hampton Tower, London, E14
properties.description:
Set within the sought-after South Quay Plaza development, this stylish 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom apartment in Hampton Tower offers a calm, contemporary home in the heart of Canary Wharf. With floor-to-ceiling windows throughout, the living space feels bright and inviting, while the part-furnished setup gives you the freedom to personalise the interiors to your taste.

Designed and delivered by Berkeley, the building provides an impressive range of lifestyle amenities. Residents have access to a 20m swimming pool and spa, a well-equipped gym, a peaceful business lounge, landscaped communal gardens, and the standout 56th-floor bar lounge and roof terrace - a perfect spot to unwind or host guests. A 24-hour concierge is on hand to support daily living.

properties.title: Harcourt Tower, 75 Marsh Wall, E14
properties.description:
Premium apartment situated on a high floor and offering sensational views. The apartment comprises two spacious bedrooms, luxury bathroom, open plan reception with modern integrated kitchen, including Siemens appliances, reconstituted stone work surfaces, glass splash-backs and handle-free storage. The apartment further benefits from underfloor heating & comfort cooling. Residents enjoy a 5-star lifestyle as they become exclusive members of The Quay Club, providing fantastic facilities including a state-of-the-art gym, 20m swimming pool overlooking the South Dock, business lounge, screening room and private dining room as well as the stunning 56th floor bar and terrace, offering panoramic views of the London skyline. 

Located just a few moments from the heart of London's fastest growing business district, SQP is incredibly well connected with direct access to South Quay DLR station and less than 5 minutes to Canary Wharf underground station and the Elizabeth Line (Crossrail). 

Council Tax Band: Tower Hamlets, F
Minimum contract: 12 months

Baltimore Wharf is a sought-after, popular waterside development close to two DLR stations: Crossharbour and South Quay, as well as parks and amenities on the Isle of Dogs. 

The development is a short walk away from Jubilee Place, One Canada Square, Jubilee line and Crossrail stations and all the amenities of Canary Wharf Business Centre.

properties.title: Amory Tower, Marsh Wall E14
properties.description:
Situated within the prestigious Amory Tower on Marsh Wall, this sophisticated two-bedroom furnished apartment offers an exceptional waterside lifestyle in the heart of Canary Wharf. The building's contemporary architecture and premium position deliver stunning south-east facing views across the River Thames, flooding the interior with natural light throughout the day.

This beautifully appointed residence benefits from the building's extensive amenities, creating a hotel-style living experience. The 24-hour concierge service ensures seamless daily living, while the fully equipped gym and spa facilities provide wellness and relaxation without leaving home. Entertainment needs are perfectly catered for with a private cinema for residents, complemented by an elegant residents bar and tranquil winter garden spaces that offer peaceful retreats above the bustling financial district.

The apartment's two bathrooms and thoughtfully designed layout maximise the 893 square feet of living space, while the furnished specification means you can move in immediately and begin enjoying this premium lifestyle. The south-east orientation captures morning light and afternoon river views, creating bright, airy interiors that showcase the Thames panorama.

Canary Wharf's dynamic character combines global business energy with sophisticated waterside living. The area's impressive skyline and modern architecture create a unique urban environment, while the riverside setting provides peaceful walking routes and outdoor dining opportunities along the Thames Path.

Transport connections are exceptional, with South Quay DLR station nearby providing swift access to Bank, London Bridge and Greenwich. Canary Wharf Underground and DLR stations offer Jubilee line services to Bond Street and Westminster, plus DLR connections throughout East London. West India Quay's restaurants and bars are moments away, alongside Canary Wharf's extensive shopping and dining destinations.

This furnished apartment delivers the ultimate in flexible, convenient living, perfectly suited for professionals seeking premium amenities and stunning Thames views in London's most dynamic business district.

We understand that cooling / heating is delivered via a communal system for which separate charges apply.

properties.title: Hobart Building, London, E14
properties.description:
Experience truly unique, five-star luxury in this exceptional two-bedroom, two-bathroom apartment within Wardian, the iconic development by Ballymore. Inspired by the Victorian botanist Nathaniel Bagshaw Ward, this furnished residence is a sanctuary of nature and refined design. The apartment features floor-to-ceiling windows and premium finishes, designed around the magnificent private 'sky garden' balcony. A generous outdoor space that seamlessly connects the interior to the stunning views of the Canary Wharf docks and skyline.

Life at Wardian centers around The Wardian Club, granting residents access to an outstanding collection of luxurious, hotel-style amenities. These include a state-of-the-art gym, a tranquil spa area, and a 25-metre open-air swimming pool. For socializing and entertainment, there is a private cinema room, a dedicated workspace, and The Observatory. A breathtaking rooftop bar and lounge on the 53rd floor with a wrap-around balcony offering panoramic views across London.

Strategically positioned in E14, the connectivity is superb. You are just a short walk from Heron Quays DLR and the main Canary Wharf station, giving you instant access to the Jubilee and Elizabeth Lines for rapid commutes to the City, West End, and beyond. Upon entering the apartment, you are greeted by a spacious and light-filled living area, which seamlessly extends to a private balcony. The balcony offers breathtaking views overlooking the river, creating a serene retreat where you can unwind and enjoy the tranquil surroundings. The apartment also boasts beautifully landscaped communal gardens, adding a touch of tranquility  to your urban living experience.

The apartment features two double bedrooms, each designed with modern finishes. The sleek, fully-fitted kitchen is equipped with integrated appliances, perfect for home-cooking enthusiasts. The open-plan design ensures a seamless flow between the kitchen, dining, and living areas, making it an excellent space for entertaining.

SHORT LET Bills included. Spacious high specification apartment in Discovery Dock East, see VIDEO TOUR. properties.title: One Thames Quay, Marsh Wall E14
properties.address: One Thames Quay, Marsh Wall E14
properties.description:
*Disclaimer - images used are of the same unit on a floor above*

This two-bedroom apartment at One Thames Quay offers a sophisticated blend of luxury, style, and convenience, providing residents with an exceptional living experience in the heart of Canary Wharf. 

The living room is tastefully furnished at the highest standard. The modern kitchen is equipped with state-of-the-art appliances, sleek countertops, and ample storage space, making cooking an enjoyable experience. Large floor-to-ceiling windows bathe the space in natural light while offering stunning panoramic views of the cityscape and the River Thames.

Residents of One Thames Quay enjoy exclusive access to a range of amenities. These include a fully equipped fitness center, a rooftop terrace providing breathtaking views, and a 24-hour concierge service for added convenience and security.

The location of One Thames Quay is highly desirable, as it is within walking distance of Canary Wharf's bustling financial district. The area offers an array of restaurants, cafes, and shops, ensuring there is always something to explore and enjoy.

We understand that cooling / heating is delivered via a communal system for which separate charges apply.

properties.title: Aspen, 50 Marsh Wall, London, E22
properties.description:
Two bedroom apartment in Aspen at Consort Place, E14. This elegant two bedroom apartment is located on a high floor and offers 825sq/ft of internal space with a South West aspect. The apartment offers an open plan kitchen/ living area with individually tailored bespoke cabinetry and engineered wood flooring, 2 double bedrooms (One ensuite) come with luxury carpets and built in wardrobes, marble effect bathroom, the apartment is finished to a high specification throughout. 

Residents facilities include  Gym, Concierge,  Sky Lounge,  Wellness Suite,  Indoor & Outdoor Play Area,  Games Room,  Dinning room,  Vitality pool, Cinema. Consort Place will offer a beautifully landscaped central plaza, shops, cafes, community and health center and a brand-new Dorset Hotel. Aspen benefits from great transport links with Canary Wharf (Jubilee line), South Quay (DLR) and Heron Quays (DLR) and The Thames Clippers all just a short walk away.

properties.title: Antilles Bay, Lawn House Close E14
properties.address: Antilles Bay, Lawn House Close E14
properties.description: Modern second floor apartment situated in Antilles Bay development overlooking South Dock and Canary Wharf financial district. The property boasts a large reception room with private balcony. Two good size double bedrooms each with their own ensuite bathroom. The property is available furnished and also benefits from secure off street parking. EPC BAND B.

properties.title: One Thames Quay, Marsh Wall
properties.description:
JOHNS&CO presents this stylish Two-bedroom apartment at the One Thames Quay development, an impressive 48-storey tower located near Canary Wharf.

The property comprises of a bedroom with a built in wardrobe, an open-concept living area with a large, fully fitted kitchen and a spacious bathroom. This apartment boasts some fantastic views across Canary Wharf and faces south/west. You will enjoy elevated living, with exclusive access to an exceptional array of private lifestyle facilities.

Residents are provided with a vast range of spaces for entertainment and relaxation. Amenities include concierge service, gardens on several floors, a bowling alley, a cinema and a 46th-floor residents' lounge, a sky gym and two landscaped roof terraces (Completion date TBC)

properties.address: Landmark West Tower, Marsh Wall E14

Located in the vibrant heart of Canary Wharf, this stylish two-bedroom apartment delivers sophisticated urban living in one of London's most dynamic districts. Transport connections are exceptional, with Heron Quays DLR station just 0.4 miles away, providing swift access to the City and beyond. The Jubilee Line at Canary Wharf station offers additional connectivity, while Thames Clipper services provide a scenic commute option.

We understand that cooling / heating is delivered via a communal system for which separate charges apply.

properties.description:
Top floor 2 bedroom/2 bathroom apartment with views overlooking South Dock and Canary Wharf.2 minute walk from South Quay DLR and 5 mins to Canary Wharf Jubilee Line station. Furnished and comes with a large terrace and walk round balcony. Neutral decor throughout. Available Mid March 2026

Specs include:
- 2 double bedrooms
- 2 Bathrooms (one ensuite)
- Top floor flat
- Large private balcony/terrace
- South Dock views
- Short walk to Canary Wharf Jubillee Line & South Quay DLR stations
- Kitchen with fitted appliances
- Neutral decor throughout
- Perfect for a couple or two sharers.

Offering you a surreal combination of luxury living, world-class amenities, and breathtaking views of the O2 Arena. 

Thoughtfully designed and elegantly finished, the apartment boasts oak flooring, programmable mood lighting, underfloor heating, and a bespoke kitchen equipped with fully integrated Smeg appliances. The bathrooms are appointed with exquisite natural marble, cultivating an ambiance of understated elegance and refined sophistication throughout. The residence is fully furnished to an exceptional standard, with every detail meticulously curated to ensure both comfort and timeless style. Residents are afforded the privilege of a 24-hour concierge service, alongside exclusive access to an array of premium leisure facilities, including a fully equipped gymnasium, swimming pool, spa, and a dedicated boxing suite. 

Superbly situated just moments from Crossharbour and South Quay DLR stations, and within comfortable walking distance of Canary Wharf, the property enjoys seamless connectivity to the City and the wider Capital.

properties.title: One Thames Quay
properties.description:
JOHNS&CO presents this stylish Two-bedroom apartment at the One Thames Quay development, an impressive 48-storey tower located near Canary Wharf.

The property comprises of a bedroom with a built in wardrobe, an open-concept living area with a large, fully fitted kitchen and a spacious bathroom. This apartment boasts some fantastic views across Canary Wharf and faces west. You will enjoy elevated living, with exclusive access to an exceptional array of private lifestyle facilities.

Residents are provided with a vast range of spaces for entertainment and relaxation. Amenities include concierge service, gardens on several floors, a bowling alley, a cinema and a 46th-floor residents' lounge, a sky gym and two landscaped roof terraces (Completion date TBC)

properties.title: Pan Peninsula Square, London, E14
properties.description:
Spacious two double bedroom apartment on a high floor and located in the prestigious Pan Peninsula building. Comprising two double bedrooms, two bathrooms, open plan reception / dining and located few moments from the heart of London's fastest growing business district, Pan Peninsula is incredibly well connected with direct access to South Quay DLR station, 5 minutes to Canary Wharf Underground Station and Crossrail (The Elizabeth Line). Residents enjoy a luxury city lifestyle as they immerse themselves in what Pan Peninsula has to offer, providing fantastic facilities including a state-of-the-art gym, a swimming pool, screening room and 24 hr Concierge Service. Offered furnished and available Now. Photos of a similar apartment and video available.
